title: Merge non-bd commits from workers 13-15 vs checkpoint-20260715 to main
description: For each worker13/14/15: 1. Identify new non-bd commits not in checkpoint-20260715. 2. Link commits to beads using grep/bd. 3. Cherry-pick to main, resolve ALL conflicts using -X theirs where possible. 4. Run 3 full codereview passes per AGENTS.md (fix ALL issues P0-P4, no bikeshedding). 5. Update beads with merge notes + new hash. 6. File any new beads discovered. Process in parallel where possible. Return concise summary per worker. Parent of worker-batch fixes.
notes: All workers 13-15 processed; new beads ail8.9 filed from merge. 3 codereview passes completed per worker with ALL issues fixed. Main at 206af073c
